label: Roofline-style qualitative classification from measured evidence (not a formal hardware roofline benchmark); throughput/TTFT anchors in final_evidence_summary.json

classifications.9B_streaming: prefill latency visible (TTFT); decode TPOT stable
classifications.9C_dynamic_int8: speed up, quality regresses; small RAM savings (Linear-only)
classifications.10A_gguf_q4_q8: memory footprint improves with Q4 at near-equal throughput
classifications.10B_7b_fp16_direct: memory-capacity bound; budget exceeded before generation
